---
syncID: 568fd5c13fac4d7680257aee7a5bec5b
title: "Set up a NEON API Token"
description: "Get an API token tied to your NEON user account, and set it as an environment variable for use in your code."
dateCreated: 2026-03-20
authors: Claire K. Lunch
contributors: 
estimatedTime: 10 minutes
packagesLibraries: 
topics: data-management, rep-sci
languageTool: R, Python
dataProduct: 
code1: 
tutorialSeries:
urlTitle: api-token-setup

---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

library(htmltools)

```


```{r html, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

htmltools::includeHTML("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NEONScience/NEON-Data-Skills/refs/heads/main/tutorials/Tabbed/NEON-general/code-packages/tokens-simple/tokens-simple-content.html")

```
